name: Iron Gauntlets
description: Sturdy gauntlets that increase melee damage output.

name: Mana Crystal
description: A pulsing crystal that reduces mana cost of all spells.

name: Shadow Cloak
description: A cloak woven from shadows, granting evasion and critical chance.

name: Healing Amulet
description: Restores a small amount of health at the end of each turn.

name: Dragon Scale
description: Legendary scale from an ancient dragon. Massive defense boost.

name: Rusty Shield
description: A battered shield. Offers minimal protection.
